etymology.description: еҲҖ(еҲҖ) (dДҒo, "knife") + дәЎ(дәЎ) (wГЎng, "perish") = depicts a tip of a blade embedded in a knife -> original meaning unclear, possibly "damage" -> precursor to дёҗ(дёҗ) (gГ i, "beggar")
etymology.interpretation: The character еҢ„ originally depicted a knife with the tip of a blade. Though its precise original meaning is unknown, it possibly conveyed the idea of 'damage' and later evolved into the related character дёҗ(дёҗ) (gГ i, "beggar").
